summary: Comprehensive testing of LearnHub Student Learning Platform completed. Verified new color palette implementation, backend API functionality (100% success), and frontend features. All major functionalities working correctly including login, dashboard, AI features, code sandbox, study rooms, forum, badges, and planner.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate - 27/27 tests passed)
Dashboard loads with correct stats and new blue/green color scheme
AI Learning Path GET RECOMMENDATIONS returns real AI responses
Code Sandbox RUN CODE executes Python successfully
Study Rooms shows 'No active study rooms' when empty, CREATE ROOM works
Forum ASK QUESTION creates threads, AI answer functionality works
Badges page accessible with earned/locked states
Planner ADD TASK creates tasks in TODO column
New color palette correctly implemented: Deep Blue #1E3A8A, Sky Blue #60A5FA, Mint Green #34D399, Off White #F9FAFB

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor UI element visibility issues)
